life is a lot like the desert: vast, unpredictable, and beautiful in its own way ✨🌅🌄🌄🐫✨ #varzaneh #iran @visitouriran 

📍at an altitude of 1477m above sea level, we were heading for sunset, dinner & stargazing at #Varzanehdesert organised by @negaarguesthouse_varzaneh & @royalfilm.varzaneh took the amazing 🚁 drone footage when a sand storm started, however this is one of the most memorable moments of the trip at @visitouriran 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 & @royalfilm.varzaneh special thanks for the drone footage with incredible skills ar the crazy strong wind conditions
